scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck
scripts.codegen: pnpm --filter @longox/api-spec run codegen && pnpm --filter @longox/api-gateway run codegen && pnpm --filter @longox/shared-types run codegen
